title: Project profile
description: A deterministic selection of exportable skills, catalogue capabilities, and policies for one project or shared lane, stored as profiles/<profile>.json. The 'profile' and 'skills' fields are the exact contract scripts/sync.mjs reads (profile.profile as the receipt's profile name, profile.skills as the list of skills/<id>/ directories to export) — do not rename them without updating that script.

profile.description: Must match the filename without extension. Read by scripts/sync.mjs as the profile name.

target_projects.description: Project names this profile applies to, or ["*"] for every project.

skills.description: Canonical skills/<id>/ directories (each with a SKILL.md) that scripts/sync.mjs exports for this profile. No arbitrary cap: include every relevant, compatible skill. Ids must be kebab-case and unique — scripts/sync.mjs rejects duplicates.

capabilities.description: catalog/capabilities/<id>.json ids: source-catalogue/provenance references for context, not exported by sync. A capability is not a substitute for an exportable skill — an entry a profile actually needs at runtime belongs in 'skills', backed by a real skills/<id>/SKILL.md.

policies.description: Relative paths under policies/ that apply to this profile.
